content.en:
"A good choice!" Shang nodded and said, "Although the Temporal Heart Seal can make you detached, it is just an ordinary transcendent person with limited potential, and choosing the Temporal and Spatial Heart Seal is not a good thing." The resurrection pool looks good, but in fact, each resurrection will consume your potential, and after nine resurrections, the potential will drop even more. If you choose the Resurrection Pool, that's the stupidest thing to do. Now, if you choose the Nine Treasure Orb, it's the best choice!, however, the Nine Treasure Orb is only effective below the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and once you transcend and step into the Heavenly Destiny Realm, the Nine Treasure Orb won't be of much use!"

After listening to Shang's story, Ye Tian was glad that he had chosen the right one.

Wow!

Shang directly took out the Nine Treasure Beads and handed them to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian didn't check it immediately, but put it away directly.

Suddenly.

Shang Youdao: "You are an official disciple of the reserves, and the reward just now is only a reward for a registered disciple, and you have another reward, which is a more precious reward than the first two rewards, that is, a Chaos Divine Power Inheritance and two Great Divine Power Inheritances." In the midst of chaos, the inheritance of the Chaos Divine Power and the top 100 of the three thousand Divine Powers is very precious, and this time the reward is that you can choose the Divine Power at will, as long as there is a Divine Power here, you can choose it, and you can also obtain a Divine Power corresponding to the origin of the thing. "

"One Chaos Divine Power, two top-notch Great Divine Powers!

Ye Tian became short of breath.

Although he also has a top-notch supernatural power, he is one of the three thousand supernatural powers, and the Hengguang supernatural power ranked 172nd, but the gap is too big compared to the top 100 supernatural powers!

"Senior Shang, what are the great supernatural powers here?"

Ye Tian asked excitedly.

"See for yourself!"

Shang waved his hand, and countless supernatural names appeared in the void.

A gate with a top-notch divine power appeared in front of him, dazzling Ye Tian.

Great Transfer, Great Divine Power Ranked 42nd

Great Immortal Technique, 26th in the Great Divine Power Ranking

Great Insight, Great Divine Power Ranked 12th

Great Destruction Technique, Ranked 72nd in the Great Divine Power

......

The top 100 supernatural powers of the three thousand supernatural powers are all preceded by a big character, which is estimated to be the name that the chaos powerhouses are used to, so it is estimated that there is a forced qualification, highlighting the power of the top supernatural powers.

And the constant light supernatural power is too weak from the name!

Then, the Shang seniors also presented the name of the Chaos Divine Power in front of Ye Tian.

But the number of Chaos Divine Powers is scarce, there are only dozens of them, and the ranking is not high.

Supreme Shifting Technique, Chaos Divine Power Ranked 75th

Tiangang Cave Yuan Divine Power, Chaos Divine Power Ranked 721st

Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power, Chaos Divine Power Ranked 2712th

......

"Senior Shang, that great being should have collected a lot of Chaos Divine Powers, why is there only so little?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

Shang smiled and said, "In the universe, there are very few chaotic supernatural powers that can be cultivated, and it is possible to practice these supernatural powers, so they will stay here." In fact, the Chaos Divine Power should not stay, because there is almost no hope for the cosmic beings to practice the Chaos Divine Power, without him, the talent is not enough, in the chaos, with some treasures that break the limit, you can enhance the talent, and you can barely reach the hope of practicing the Chaos Divine Power, and there is no hope in the universe! But you can still choose a Chaos Divine Power, you can't cultivate it now, and you can cultivate it in the future!

Ye Tian nodded, the cultivation requirements of the Chaos Divine Power are indeed too difficult and difficult, even him, if he doesn't have the ability to copy and can fuse the talent, otherwise he can't practice the Constant Light Divine Power, and this is just a great Divine Power, and the Chaos Divine Power is not even qualified to cultivate now!

Ye Tianxian stared at the Chaos Divine Powers and took a closer look, these Chaos Divine Powers were also introduced later, not just one name.

When he saw Gu Yuan's supernatural powers, his expression suddenly moved.

"The Origin Thing needed for this Chaos Divine Power turned out to be the Origin Well, so if I said that, I met one of the basic conditions for cultivating the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power. "

Ye Tian has made a decision.

Maybe Gu Yuan's Imperial Body Divine Power is very ordinary, far inferior to other Chaos Divine Powers, but the strongest Chaos Divine Power here is just the Supreme Movement Technique, and the Origin Thing on it is too rare, he doesn't know when he will get it.

And the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Ability, which he has the hope of cultivating, is more important than other powerful Chaos Divine Powers that are far away.

"Although the Supreme Movement Technique is extremely precious, if I really become the official disciple of that great existence, maybe I can obtain even more precious Chaos Divine Powers, and the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Powers are the most suitable for me right now!"

Ye Tian thought so in his heart, and he made a decision.

"Chaos Divine Power, I choose Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power!"

Ye Tian said.

"You choose the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power, this is only the Chaos Divine Power ranked 2712th?"

Shang was surprised.

According to his thoughts, Ye Tian should definitely choose the Chaos Divine Power of the Supreme Movement Technique.

"Why?"

Shang asked curiously.

Ye Tian didn't speak, but unfolded his Chaos Origin Ancient Well Vision.

Seeing this vision, Shang completely understood: "I didn't expect you to be lucky enough to obtain the Well of Origin!"

With the Origin Well, Ye Tian had one of the conditions for cultivating the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power, and at least he had the hope of cultivation.

"Ye Tian, although you have the Innate Origin Well, which is in line with the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power, you must have the corresponding super god-level talent, and the super god-level talent corresponding to the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power is a fusion of earth and flesh talents, and this kind of talent is also called the Earth Yuan Talent! But in the universe, the limit of the earth-based talent is the god-level, and only those who have the super-god-level earth-level earth-level talent formed by the fusion of the super-god-level earth-type talent and the super-god-level physical body talent can be qualified to cultivate the ancient yuan imperial body supernatural power! Now, you understand the difficulty of cultivating the chaotic supernatural power! In the chaos, the geniuses who can cultivate the rudiments of the chaotic supernatural power in the realm of the earth are basically the personal disciples of the ancient Hedao existence and some geniuses who defy the sky. "

Shang explained.

"Super god-level earth-based talent, super-god-level flesh-type talent!"

Ye Tian secretly wrote it down.

For others, the fusion of earth-type talents and flesh-type talents is the most difficult thing, but he can use the copying talent to do it easily, but it is too difficult to fuse to obtain a super-god-level earth-type talent.

He has earth-based talents, but they are all god-level, and he doesn't know how to improve to the super god level.

"Senior Shang, is there really no way to have super-god-level earth-type talents and super-god-level physical talents in the universe?"

Ye Tian seemed a little unwilling to ask.

Shang was silent for a while, and said: "No way, there is almost no way to improve to a super god-level talent in the universe, at least I don't know, only some special races will have a super god-level talent!"

"Some special races?"

Ye Tian's heart moved.

If he found such a race, he could completely copy the other party's super god-level talent!

However, in the universe, only time talents and space talents can reach the super god level, and the limit of other talents is the god level!

Shang didn't say much, but threw a classic book to Ye Tian.

"The above is some special race information about the universe, you can take a look, as for whether your universe has super-god-level earth-type talents and super-god-level flesh-type creatures, I can't guarantee it!"

Shang said.
